scripts.build:mcp: cd mcp && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:qa: cd packages/mailagent-qa && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:agent: cd packages/mailagent-agent && npm install && npm run build
scripts.publish:mcp: npm run build:mcp && cd mcp && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:qa: npm run build:qa && cd packages/mailagent-qa && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:agent: npm run build:agent && cd packages/mailagent-agent && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:all: npm run publish:check && npm run publish:mcp && npm run publish:qa && npm run publish:agent
